detectors.description:
Discord.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (Discord.sol#1503-1531) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (Discord.sol#1505)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Discord.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		Discord.transfer(address,uint256)
		Discord._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
